CRITICAL.name: data_freshness_breach
CRITICAL.condition: Pipeline has not run in more than 24 hours
CRITICAL.message: Data freshness alert: Pipeline has not run in more than 24 hours. Stale data is affecting financial reports.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and restart the pipeline immediately.

CRITICAL.name: data_quality_breach
CRITICAL.message: Data quality alert: Data quality percentage is below 99.9%. Erroneous financial reports and decision-making are possible.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate data quality issues and take corrective actions.

CRITICAL.name: row_count_out_of_bounds
CRITICAL.condition: Row count is outside the bounds of 17 to 25
CRITICAL.message: Row count alert: Row count is outside the bounds of 17 to 25. Data completeness is affected.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate the cause of the row count being out of bounds.

WARNING.name: runtime_approaching_limit
WARNING.condition: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit
WARNING.message: Runtime alert: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit. Dashboard update may be delayed.
WARNING.recommended_action: Monitor pipeline runtime and optimize if necessary.

WARNING.name: data_quality_slightly_below_threshold
WARNING.condition: Data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%
WARNING.message: Data quality alert: Data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%. Potential for erroneous reports exists.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate and address data quality issues.

WARNING.name: merchant_failure_rate_spike
WARNING.condition: One merchant's failure rate spikes above 30%
WARNING.message: Merchant failure alert: One merchant's failure rate has spiked above 30%.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the cause of the failure rate spike for the affected merchant.

INFO.name: new_payment_method_detected
INFO.condition: A new payment method is detected in the data
INFO.message: New payment method detected: A new payment method has been detected in the data.
INFO.recommended_action: Log the new payment method for future reference.

INFO.name: row_count_near_bounds
INFO.condition: Daily row count is near the bounds of 17 to 25
INFO.message: Row count alert: Daily row count is near the bounds of 17 to 25 but within limits.
INFO.recommended_action: Monitor row count for any trends or issues.
